title: ranunculus subindivisus
intro: Ranunculus subindivisus, also known as the lesser spearwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, and also exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Ranunculus subindivisus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used topically as a salve or cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
